subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God! Were ye to perceive that which hath befallen this Prisoner, ye would verily lament and weep [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا احباء الله لو تطلعن علی ما ورد علی  هذالمسجون  لتنوحن و تبکون انه
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
